posts.topic: Life categories self-assessment
posts.caption:
Rate Your Life. No lying.
Are you truly honest?
What's your total score?
Send this to your friend. Compare scores.
posts.alt_text: A vibrant graphic with the text 'Rate Your Life' and a 1-10 scale, challenging viewers to be honest.
posts.youtube_title: Your TRUE Life Score? Rate Yourself 1-10!
posts.notes: series:Rate Your Life | Bright, clean graphics. Each slide features a bold category name, a clear 1-10 numerical scale, and a relevant icon/minimalistic background. Maintain a consistent 'Choose Wisely' branding. | generated_by=gemini:gemini-2.5-flash
slides: Slide 1: '1. Career Growth.' (Visual: Person climbing a stylized ladder, 1-10 scale bar below)
Slide 2: '2. Financial Health.' (Visual: Stack of coins and bills with a growing arrow, 1-10 scale bar below)
Slide 3: '3. Mental Clarity.' (Visual: Silhouette of a calm person meditating, abstract clear mind, 1-10 scale bar below)
Slide 4: '4. Social Connections.' (Visual: Minimalist icons of diverse people linked together, 1-10 scale bar below)
Slide 5: '5. Physical Fitness.' (Visual: Person in dynamic pose (running/jumping), athletic build, 1-10 scale bar below)

posts.topic: Life choice: Rich vs. Friends
posts.caption:
1 crucial decision.
Your true priority?
What defines a good life?
Send this to see if your friend picks the same.
posts.alt_text: Split screen showing a luxurious, empty mansion on one side and a group of happy friends laughing together on the other, representing the choice.
posts.youtube_title: Rich & Alone or Broke with Friends? Only 1 Pick!
posts.notes: Dramatic split screen. Left side: opulent, modern, empty mansion interior (clean lines, muted tones, maybe one person looking out a window alone). Right side: warm, vibrant group of diverse friends laughing, eating street food or at a casual gathering (dynamic, close-up shots). Quick cuts between the two contrasting scenes for the reel. | generated_by=gemini:gemini-2.5-flash

posts.topic: Lifestyle choice: City vs. Mountains
posts.caption:
Pick 1 life.
Where would you thrive?
Concrete jungle or serene peaks?
Tag a friend who lives there.
posts.alt_text: Carousel header image showing a split view: vibrant city skyline with skyscrapers and neon lights versus serene mountain range with clear lake and pine trees.
posts.youtube_title: City vs. Mountains: Which Home Is Yours? 1 Pick.
posts.notes: Clean, crisp photography for each slide. Each slide should visually represent a distinct aspect of either city or mountain life, with a clear contrast. Bright, engaging colors for city; natural, calming tones for mountains. | generated_by=gemini:gemini-2.5-flash
slides: Slide 1: 'City Nights.' (Visual: Dynamic shot of a bustling city street at night, neon signs, taxis, energetic crowd motion blur)
Slide 2: 'Mountain Stars.' (Visual: A wide shot of a clear night sky over a rugged mountain landscape, thousands of stars visible, maybe a distant campfire glow)
Slide 3: 'Rush Hour Transit.' (Visual: A crowded subway car interior or a traffic-jammed urban highway, close-up of faces showing slight stress)
Slide 4: 'Forest Walk Commute.' (Visual: A tranquil person walking alone on a sun-dappled forest path, dappled light, sense of peace)
Slide 5: 'Corner Cafe Vibes.' (Visual: A stylish, busy city cafe interior, diverse people, laptop users, close-up of a latte with art)
Slide 6: 'Cabin Coffee View.' (Visual: Hands holding a rustic mug of coffee, looking out from a cozy cabin porch over a misty mountain valley at sunrise)
